---
title: "bonferroni"
generated: true
description: "Bonferroni family-wise correction."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:bonferroni -->
```python
bonferroni(p_values: Float[Array, 'n'], *, alpha: float = 0.05) -> Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:bonferroni -->
Bonferroni family-wise correction.

Returns `(rejected, p_adjusted)` with `p_adjusted = min(p * n, 1)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:bonferroni -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `n` | — | — |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.05` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:bonferroni -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
